name: First Internet Bancorp
summary: PART I When we refer to First Internet Bancorp, the Company, we, us and our in the remainder of this Annual Report on Form 10-K, we mean First Internet Bancorp and its consolidated subsidiaries, unless the context indicates otherwise. References to First Internet Bank or the Bank refer to First Internet Bank of Indiana, an Indiana chartered bank and wholly-owned subsidiary of the Company.
